title: Taittiriya Brahmana: The Five Sacred Fires
description: Taittiriya Brahmana — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.
introduction: Taittiriya Brahmana — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.

translation.text: There are five sacred fires. The garhapatya fire of the householder. The ahavaniya fire of offerings. The dakshinagni of the south. The sabhya fire of the assembly. The avasathya fire of the dwelling place.
